title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. verlotii
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. verlotii is a subspecies of the Hieracium glaucinum plant, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. verlotii include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immunomodulator. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant's roots and rhizomes to make a tincture or decoction.
